mainEntity.name: Can occupational illness claims be filed after retirement in Bountiful?
mainEntity.text: Can occupational illness claims be filed after retirement in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah permits post-retirement occupational illness claims if within 3 years of discovery and causally linked to past Bountiful employment.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Retirees qualify for medical and disability benefits despite no lost wages. Prove exposure during tenure. North Salt Lake insurers offset pensions; attorneys calculate true value including future care. Farmington seniors succeed with archived OSHA data.[5][3]

name: Post-Retirement Occupational Illness Claims
description: Yes, Utah permits post-retirement occupational illness claims if within 3 years of discovery and causally linked to past Bountiful employment.[5]
